summary: Clean Simple Workflow looks close to production-ready with an overall score of 100/100. The audit found 0 critical issue(s), 0 total finding(s), and 6 node(s).

recommendedFixes.title: Keep release checklist current
recommendedFixes.action: Re-run this audit after meaningful workflow changes and before production releases.

productionChecklist.label: Workflow parses as n8n JSON
productionChecklist.detail: The uploaded JSON has a plausible n8n nodes and connections shape.

productionChecklist.label: Error handling exists
productionChecklist.detail: Production workflows should have an Error Trigger, failure branch, or continue-on-fail strategy.

productionChecklist.label: Webhook inputs are validated
productionChecklist.detail: Webhook workflows should authenticate requests and validate payload shape before side effects.

productionChecklist.label: HTTP calls use validation or authentication indicators
productionChecklist.detail: External HTTP calls should use n8n credentials, authenticated request settings, signed headers, or validated payloads.

productionChecklist.label: External calls have retry or fallback behavior
productionChecklist.detail: HTTP calls should define retries, timeouts, fallback paths, or idempotent recovery.

productionChecklist.label: AI outputs are structured
productionChecklist.detail: LLM steps should return predictable schemas before downstream automation consumes the result.

productionChecklist.label: Secrets are not hardcoded
productionChecklist.detail: Credentials should live in n8n credentials or environment variables, not node parameters.

productionChecklist.label: Workflow is documented
productionChecklist.detail: Complex workflows need sticky notes or documentation that explain ownership and assumptions.

productionChecklist.label: Alerting or logging exists for external dependencies
productionChecklist.detail: External calls should emit useful logs or notify owners when production behavior degrades.

suggestedNextSteps: Run a staging dry run with representative payloads and monitor logs.
